name: Propose a term

labels: ["new-term"]

**English term**
<!-- e.g. Access Point -->

**Language(s) this applies to**
<!-- Amharic (am), Afaan Oromoo (om), or both -->

**Proposed local-language term**
<!-- The term in Ge'ez (Amharic) or Latin (Afaan Oromoo) script -->

**Definition (local language)**

**Definition (English, optional)**

**Suggested category (optional)**
<!-- e.g. Channel, Concept, Process, Role/Actor -->

**Usage example (optional)**

**Source / justification**
<!-- Where does this term come from? Why should it be included? -->
